AMI Trademarks

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” positioning=”none” z_index=”2″ custom_margin=”|20px||20px|false|true” custom_margin_tablet=”|20px||20px|false|true” custom_margin_phone=”|10px||10px|false|true” custom_margin_last_edited=”on|phone” border_radii=”off|15px|15px||” border_radii_tablet=”on||||” border_radii_phone=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_radii_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”3_4,1_4″ use_custom_gutter=”on” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” width_phone=”90%” width_last_edited=”off|desktop” max_width=”2560px” custom_margin=”||40px||false|false” custom_padding=”||||true|true” custom_padding_tablet=”30px|30px|30px|30px|true|true” custom_padding_phone=”20px|20px|20px|20px|true|true” hover_enabled=”0″ border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-3e745b50-5208-42d4-956a-2f73fba491de%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}” width__hover_enabled=”off|desktop” sticky_enabled=”0″][et_pb_column type=”3_4″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_css_main_element=”display:flex;||flex-direction:column;||margin: auto” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Aptos||||||||” text_text_color=”#000000″ text_line_height=”1.3em” width_tablet=”” width_phone=”100%” width_last_edited=”on|desktop” max_width=”100%” max_width_tablet=”100%” max_width_phone=”100%” max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” module_alignment=”left” custom_margin=”||20px||false|false” hover_enabled=”0″ text_font_size_tablet=”18px” text_font_size_phone=”16px” text_font_size_last_edited=”off|desktop” global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″]

AMI creates and manufactures key hardware and software solutions for the global computer marketplace, providing the highest quality and compatibility necessary to build today’s advanced computing systems. The company’s name and key brand families such as AMIBIOS® are known worldwide, synonymous with high-quality computer firmware, software and hardware products as well as industry-leading development and engineering support services. But our trademarks represent more than simply our products; they are a symbol of the company’s long history of technological innovation and a pioneering spirit sustained over 30 years of partnership and support of the world’s leading computer systems manufacturers.

Proper use and attribution of AMI trademarks by third parties is important. Generally speaking, third parties may use AMI trademarks or product names to refer to our products and services provided they follow typically observed guidelines. However, their use must not mislead consumers as to any sponsorship, affiliation, or endorsement of a specific company, or of its products or services, by AMI.

When referring to AMI trademarks and the names of the company’s software, products, and services on packaging, promotional materials, advertising, websites and other collateral, please follow standard trademark guidelines such as those available from the International Trademark Association. These guidelines outline the basic protocols for using trademarks and product / service names belonging to AMI in print and online publications. If you have a question that falls outside the scope of the guidelines and information provided here, please consult your legal counsel or contact the AMI Marketing Department for guidance via our online Contact Form.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Aptos||||||||” text_text_color=”#000000″ text_line_height=”1.3em” width_tablet=”” width_phone=”100%” width_last_edited=”on|desktop” max_width=”100%” max_width_tablet=”100%” max_width_phone=”100%” max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” module_alignment=”left” custom_margin=”||20px||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”]

 A list of AMI trademarks that are currently registered with the US Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) are listed here.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_4″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Aptos|600|||||||” text_text_color=”#000000″ text_line_height=”1.5em” width_tablet=”” width_phone=”100%” width_last_edited=”on|desktop” max_width=”100%” max_width_tablet=”100%” max_width_phone=”100%” max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” module_alignment=”left” custom_margin=”||20px||false|false” text_font_size_tablet=”18px” text_font_size_phone=”16px” text_font_size_last_edited=”off|desktop” global_colors_info=”{}”]American Megatrends®
